Localization.Description: The use of Herpaderping was detected. Herpaderping is a method of bypassing antivirus and security tools by modifying the content of a file after it has been mapped into memory, but before the first thread is initiated

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the image of process {object.process.name} using the Process Herpaderping technique via utility {object.process.parent.name} on host {event_src.host}
